title: GTA Online: The Kortz Center Heist
headline: GTA Online: The Kortz Center Heist
subtitle: Nominated Jobs
content:
You can now nominate up to 16 player-created Jobs via leaderboards or the Pause, My Jobs, Bookmarked, Community, Verified, or Recently Played menus.

A selection of the jobs nominated by players in the session will be shown on the Next Job Vote Screen after playing any user-generated content.

To view and remove your nominated jobs, go to Online > Jobs > Play Job > Nominated Jobs.
